value.body:
## Context

Roadmap execution needs more than parent/child grouping. Agents should not claim work that is blocked by unfinished prerequisites, and users need to see why a ticket is not ready.

## Outcome

Tickets support explicit dependency and blocker relationships that can be read, written, visualized, and used by scheduling/queue logic.

## Acceptance criteria

- Ticket contracts support dependency edges such as `depends_on`, `blocks`, and `related` with repository-scoped validation.
- API/usecases expose add/remove/list dependency operations.
- Renderer shows blocked state, blocking tickets, downstream blocked tickets, and dependency warnings.
- Circular dependencies are rejected or surfaced as validation failures.
- Existing parent/child behavior remains separate from dependency edges.
- Tests cover schema validation, cycle detection, API behavior, and UI mapping.

frontmatter.title: Add ticket dependency and blocker relationships

value.title: Add ticket dependency and blocker relationships
